title: T-043 — Allergen changeover runtime endpoints and start-gate evaluator
prompt:
# T-043 — Allergen changeover runtime endpoints and start-gate evaluator

PRD/UX refs: §8.2.6, §7.1 FR-08-E1-001, SCR-08-03, MODAL-08-11

Goal: Implement cleaning-step, ATP result, dual sign-off endpoints and wire allergen_changeover_gate_v1 into WO START.

Implementation details:
Use changeover_events and allergen_changeover_validations. The evaluator compares current/next allergen profile from the WO factory spec/BOM snapshot, creates or loads a changeover_event, blocks START with 423 for medium/high/segregated requirements, records cleaning checklist and ATP readings, and unlocks only after required dual sign-off. Segregated hard-block returns a typed blocker and cannot be overridden in Production.

Scope files:
- packages/api-services/production/allergen-changeover.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/production/changeover-events/[id]/cleaning-step/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/production/changeover-events/[id]/atp-result/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/production/changeover-events/[id]/sign-off/route.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/start-wo.ts [modify]

Acceptance criteria:
1. START returns 423 and redirect_url when required changeover is incomplete
2. Cleaning/ATP/sign-off endpoints persist auditable records with signer roles
3. Completed required dual sign-off permits START without selecting a new BOM/spec

Evidence: include screenshots/artifacts and Playwright traces/artifacts for UI/E2E tasks; include API test output for backend tasks.
